info.title: Saluna API
info.description: Tenant-facing Saluna API. Generated from Hono OpenAPI route definitions. This contract is expanded incrementally; clients, staff, services catalog, appointments, appointment-requests, settings, salon-profile, salon-public-settings, and onboarding route groups are documented.

tags.name: Staff
tags.description: Staff roster, schedules, and service assignments

tags.name: Services
tags.description: Salon services, combo packages, and starter imports

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Salon business hours and slot duration

tags.name: Salon public settings
tags.description: Public booking page settings and slug

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: Manager onboarding wizard status and step actions

id.description: Optional client-provided UUID for offline-first sync

reason.description: Follow-up reason; unknown values default to manual server-side

schedule.description: Weekly schedule rows (one per day of week)

id.description: Optional client-provided UUID for offline-first sync

staffId.description: Staff member assigned when converting the request to an appointment

reason.description: Optional rejection reason shown to salon staff

get.description: Returns all non-placeholder clients for the authenticated salon tenant.

409.description: Phone number already registered for this salon

200.description: Catalog presets available to the salon

404.description: Catalog preset not found or inactive

409.description: Preset collides with existing salon catalog

200.description: Appointments with client, staff, and service details

patch.description: Managers may update any field. Staff may patch status on their own appointments. Cancelling a placeholder appointment may return a cleanup payload instead of an appointment.

409.description: Phone number already registered for another client

get.description: Manager inbox for public booking requests. Pending filter excludes past requested dates.

allOf.description: Filter by request status. Defaults to pending on the server.

parameters.description: Filter by request status. Defaults to pending on the server.
parameters.name: status

200.description: Appointment requests for the authenticated salon

404.description: Appointment request not found or no longer pending

409.description: Slot no longer available or intake validation failed

404.description: Appointment request not found or no longer pending

get.description: Salon working hours and slot duration. Readable by any tenant member.

200.description: Business settings for the authenticated salon

get.description: Address, maps, social links, and website shown on the public page.

200.description: Public page settings, slug, and service visibility
Updated slug and refreshed public page settings

409.description: Slug already taken by another salon

get.description: Salon setup progress for the manager onboarding wizard. Step flags are derived from salon data.

200.description: Current onboarding status for the authenticated salon

patch.description: Apply a wizard action such as confirming business hours, marking the manager as solo staff, completing, skipping, or reopening onboarding.
